title: Section 106
content: 1[Procedure of Authority, Appellate Authority and National Appellate Authority.]--- The Authority or the Appellate Authority 2[or the National Appellate Authority] shall, subject to the provisions of this Chapter, have power to regulate its own procedure.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 23 of 2019, s. 110 for "marginal heading" (w.e.f. 1-1-2020). 2. Ins. by s. 110, ibid. (w.e.f. 1-1-2020).
